description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle features a long, standard barrel with a front post iron sight and a rear notch sight, both integrated into the metalwork. The wooden components have a natural brown finish, contrasting with the dark, matte metal body. The magazine is prominently curved and made of metal, designed for rapid reloading. The trigger, safety lever, and charging handle are all visible, indicating functional interactive parts. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, typical of military rifles used in urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and curved detachable magazine. Features iron sights and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock and handguard, curved magazine, and both iron sights.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the barrel, receiver, and magazine, with the iron sights in line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the wooden stock, handguard, and the magazine, with visible safety lever and charging handle.
